name: Frittata Veronique with Sweet Red Pepper Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Sweet Italian or Hot Italian Sausage, cooked and sliced
1 pound red bell peppers, seeded and finely julienned
recipeInstructions:
Frittata:
1. Combine wine, eggs, and whipping cream in a bowl. Stir the cream into the eggs until well combined. Set aside.
2. Place sausage, peppers, and onions in a skillet with olive oil and sauté until tender.
3. Spray a baking dish with non-stick spray or lightly coat with oil.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and evenly distribute the sausage mixture on top.
5. Sprinkle cheese over the top of the frittata.
6. Place the dish in a 350°F (175°C) oven and bake until set and lightly browned. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
Relish:
1. Soak mustard seeds in hot water for 2-3 hours, then drain.
2. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
3. Remove from heat and let it cool before refrigerating.
